enriched_points.expanded_content: Investigate how agroecosystems provide vital services like food production, climate regulation, and habitat conservation, enhancing ecosystem resilience and sustainability.
Examine the role of biodiversity in natural pest control, focusing on how it can reduce dependency on chemical pesticides and promote ecological balance.
Compare traditional and modern farming methods, assessing their impacts on biodiversity and overall ecosystem health within agroecosystems.
Suggest innovative practices to boost biodiversity in agroecosystems, such as crop diversification, organic farming, and integrated pest management.
